hero.title: Geometry Dash Online
hero.description: Experience the ultimate rhythm-based platformer challenge - Jump, fly, and flip through dangerous passages!

game.hint: Click the game area to start, use arrow keys or tap to control
game.mobileHint: Landscape mode recommended for the best experience on mobile
game.fullscreenTip: 💡 Tip: Use the in-game fullscreen button after clicking the game area

rhythm.title: Rhythm-Based Gameplay
rhythm.description: Jump to the beat of catchy electronic music tracks

modes.title: Multiple Game Modes
modes.description: Experience different gameplay styles and challenges

replayability.title: Endless Replayability
replayability.description: Practice levels and improve your skills over time

footer.description: Your ultimate destination for free online games. Play anytime, anywhere!
footer.legalText: This is a fan-made website for entertainment purposes. Geometry Dash is a trademark of RobTop Games. We are not affiliated with RobTop Games.

orientation.hint: Please rotate your device to landscape mode for the best gaming experience

toast.fullscreenErrorDesc: Fullscreen is restricted by the game server. Please use landscape mode for the best experience, or try the in-game fullscreen button.
toast.tipsDesc: Rotate your device to landscape mode for a better gaming experience!
